hooks.command: powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $todos = (Get-Content PLAN.md -Encoding UTF8) | Where-Object { $_ -match '^- \[ \]' }; if ($todos.Count -gt 0) { Write-Host '完了したタスクがあれば PLAN.md を [x] に更新してください。'; Write-Host ''; Write-Host ('未完了: ' + $todos.Count + '件'); $todos | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }; exit 2 }"
